pairs.m: एहि भर्सन द्वारा नव-नव लेखककेँ प्रोत्साहन भेटल जकर प्रभाव निकट भविष्यमे देखबामे आएत।
pairs.e: Through this version, new writers got encouragement, the effect of which will be seen in the near future.

pairs.m: People You May Know--- मैथिल ई भ्रम पोसने रहै छै जे लोक हमर प्रोफाइल नुका कऽ देखैए तँइ हमरा 'People You May Know' मे लोक सभ देखाइए।
pairs.e: People You May Know — Maithili people have been nurturing this misconception that people see my profile secretly, so that's why I appear in people's "People You May Know."

pairs.m: किछु लोकक ईहो विचार छनि जे जँ हम केकरो प्रोफाइल नुका कऽ देखबै तँ हमरो ई देखाएत।
pairs.e: Some people also have the view that if I secretly see someone's profile, that will also appear in mine.

pairs.m: हमरा समझसँ ई पूर्णतः भ्रम छै।
pairs.e: In my understanding, this is completely a misconception.

pairs.m: भ्रमसँ बेसी आत्ममुग्धता कहल जेतै।
pairs.e: More than a misconception it would be called narcissism.

pairs.m: ओना ई भ्रम आनो समाजमे छै आ गूगलपर एकर समर्थनमे सेहो लेख भेटि जाएत मुदा फेसबुकक हिसाबसँ देखल जाए तँ ओहन लोक जे कि अहाँक कोनो मित्रक लिस्टमे छथि तकरा फेसबुक 'People You May Know' मे देखाबै छै तेनाहिते जँ कियो ग्रुपमे छथि तँ ओहि ग्रुपक सभ सदस्यकेँ एक-दोसर 'People You May Know' बला खंडमे समय-समयपर देखाइ पड़तनि।
pairs.e: Though this misconception exists in other societies too, and in support of it articles will also be found on Google, but looking from Facebook's perspective — those people who are in some friend's list of yours, Facebook shows them in "People You May Know."

pairs.m: फेसबुक स्थान, शिक्षण संस्थान, रुचि, कार्य आदिक आधारपर सेहो 'People You May Know' मे दै छै।
pairs.e: Similarly, if someone is in a group, then all members of that group will appear to each other in the "People You May Know" section from time to time.

pairs.m: सभसँ बेसी मजा केर बात ई जे 2014 मे फेसबुक ह्वाट्सएपकेँ कीनि लेलकै।
pairs.e: Facebook also gives in "People You May Know" based on location, educational institution, interests, work, etc. The most amusing thing is that in 2014 Facebook bought WhatsApp. Now see how WhatsApp works.

pairs.m: आब ह्वाट्सएप कोना काज करै छै से देखियौ।
pairs.e: When someone starts WhatsApp, WhatsApp asks the user whether WhatsApp can use their photos, contacts, camera, etc., and generally we all allow it.

pairs.m: जखन कियो ह्वाट्सएप शुरू करै छै तखन ह्वाट्सएप प्रयोगकर्तासँ पूछै छै जे कि ह्वाट्सएप अहाँक फोटो, कान्टेक्ट, कैमरा आदिक प्रयोग कऽ सकैए आ समान्यतः हम सभ ओकरा एलाउ कऽ दैत छियै।
pairs.e: The real game is here too.

pairs.m: असल खेला एहू ठाम छै।
pairs.e: Suppose someone is in your contact list who is not with you on Facebook, but Facebook will show that person in the "People You May Know" list.

pairs.m: मानू जे अहाँक कान्टेक्ट लिस्टमे एहनो आदमी छथि जे कि अहाँ संग फेसबुकपर नै छथि मुदा फेसबुक ओहि आदमीकेँ 'People You May Know' बला लिस्टमे देखेतै।
pairs.e: Here the thing to keep in mind is that Facebook gives people's suggestions based on location, educational institution, interests, work, etc. — it could be anyone.

pairs.m: एहिठाम ई धेआन राखए बला बात ई जे स्थान, शिक्षण संस्थान, रुचि, कार्य आदिक आधारपर फेसबुक लोकक सजेशन दै छै से कियो भऽ सकैए जँ इच्छा अछि तँ जूड़ू अन्यथा ओकरा रीमूभ कऽ दियौ।
pairs.e: If you wish, join; otherwise remove it.

pairs.m: जुड़बै कोना जखन कि अहाँ ओकर प्रोफाइल चेक करबै आ जँ मनोनुकूल हएत।
pairs.e: How will you join — when you check their profile and if it is to your liking.

pairs.m: जँ मनोनुकूल नै भेल तँ अहाँ अपना घर आ लिस्ट बला तँ अपना घरमे अछिए।
pairs.e: If not to your liking, your home and your list are your home.

pairs.m: मुदा ई साक्षात भ्रमे छै जे 'People You May Know' बला लिस्टमे वएह आदमी आएत जे कि अहाँक प्रोफाइल चेक करत।
pairs.e: But it is simply a misconception that whoever sees your profile secretly will appear in "People You May Know."

pairs.m: विदेहक फेसबुक भर्सन https://www.
pairs.e: Videha's Facebook version https://www.

pairs.m: com/groups/videha/, एहि ग्रुप मुख्य एडमिन गजेन्द्र ठाकुर छथि।
pairs.e: com/groups/videha/ — main admin Gajendra Thakur.

pairs.m: एहिठाम हम विदेहक फेसबुक भर्सन केर किछु काज संक्षिप्त रूपें देखा रहल छी
pairs.e: Here I am showing some work of Videha's Facebook version briefly:

pairs.m: A) विदेह फेसबुक ग्रुपपर सभसँ पहिल काज मैथिली हाइकू केर अछि।
pairs.e: A) The first work on Videha Facebook group is related to Maithili haiku.

pairs.m: गजेन्द्र ठाकुर पहिने हाइकू केर आलेख देलखिन तकर बाद हरेक दिन एकटा गाछक वा कोनो फोटो द' क' हाइकू लिखबाक आग्रह करै छलखिन। एकर प्रभाव तेहन तेहन भेलै जे सभसँ पहिने मैथिलीमे हाइकू केर लेखकमे अभूतपूर्व वृद्धि देखल गेल जाहिमे सुनील कुमार झा, मिहिर झा, ओमप्रकाश झा, इरा मल्लिक, शिव कुमार झा, ज्योति सुनीत चौधरी, अमित मिश्र, चंदन कुमार झा, मुन्नाजी, रामविलास साहु सहित एहि पाँतिक लेखक सेहो सम्मलित छथि।
pairs.e: Gajendra Thakur first gave an article on haiku, then every day he would give a photo of some tree or something else and request writing haiku.

pairs.m: 2008सँ मैथिली हाइकू केर ब्लाग सेहो अछि जाहि ठाम विदेहक फेसबुक भर्सनसँ हाइकू केर संग्रह कएल गेल अछि। ई ब्लाग एहि पतापर देखल जा सकैए http://maithili-haiku.
pairs.e: Its effect was such that an unprecedented increase in haiku writers in Maithili was first seen, in which Sunil Kumar Jha, Mihir Jha, Omprakash Jha, Ira Mallik, Shiv Kumar Jha, Jyoti Sunit Chaudhary, Amit Mishra, Chandan Kumar Jha, Munna ji, Ramvilas Sahu, and writers of this category are included. From 2008 there is also a Maithili haiku blog where haiku from Videha's Facebook version were collected. This blog can be seen at this link http://maithili-haiku.

pairs.m: B) फेसबुकक माध्यमसँ विदेह मैथिलीक वर्तनी ओ मानकता लेल नीक प्रयास केने अछि आ तही कारणसँ कमसँ कम इंटरनेटपर सुदूर नेपालसँ लए कऽ दरंभगाक मैथिली एकसमान भेल अछि (ईहो धातव्य जे किछु जबरदस्ती बला मानकता बला विद्वान सभ एखनो कृत्रिम मैथिलीकेँ पकड़ने छथि)।
pairs.e: B) Through Facebook, Videha has made a good effort for Maithili's spelling and standardisation, and because of that at least on the internet, Maithili from faraway Nepal to Darbhanga has become uniform (it is also noteworthy that some scholars of forcible standardisation are still holding onto artificial Maithili).

pairs.m: विदेहक एहि मानक भाषाक लेखककेँ "भाषापाक" नाम देल गेलै जे कि विदेह पोथी डाउनलोडपर सेहो उपल्बध अछि।
pairs.e: This standard language of Videha is called "Bhasha Pak."

pairs.m: C) विदेहक फेसबुक भर्सनपर जतेक नाटक संबंधी रचना आएल तकरा विदेह मैथिली नाट्य उत्सव नामक ब्लागपर राखल गेल अछि।
pairs.e: C) All drama-related compositions that came on Videha's Facebook version were placed on the blog named Videha Maithili Natya Utsav.

pairs.m: विदेह ग्रुपक सहयोगसँ लगातार चनौरागंजमे विदेह नाट्य उत्सवक आयोजन भेल अछि जे कि मैथिलीमे समानांतर नाट्य अवधाणाकेँ मजगूत केलक।
pairs.e: With the cooperation of Videha group, the Videha Natya Utsav (drama festival) was continuously organised at Chanauragonj, which strengthened the parallel drama concept in Maithili.

pairs.m: D) विदेहक फेसबुक भर्सन मैथिली बीहनि कथाक लगातार सहयोगी बनल रहल।
pairs.e: D) Videha's Facebook version remained a continuous support for Maithili Vihani Katha.

pairs.m: एहि ठाम देल गेल आ प्रोत्साहित भेल बीहनिकथाकारकेँ मैथिली बीहनिकथा ब्लागपर राखल गेल जकरा एहि लिंकपर देखल जा सकैए http://vihanikatha.
pairs.e: The Vihani Katha writers encouraged and given here were placed on the Maithili Vihani Katha blog, which can be seen at this link http://vihanikatha.

pairs.m: E) विदेह ग्रुपपर आएल प्रमुख कविताकेँ मैथिली कविता नामक ब्लागपर राखल गेल अछि जकरा http://maithili-kavita.
pairs.e: E) Main poems that came on Videha group were placed on the blog named Maithili Kavita, which can be seen at http://maithili-kavita.

pairs.m: com/ लिंकपर देखल जा सकैए।
pairs.e: com/.

pairs.m: लगभग 400सँ उपर कविताक संकलन अछि।
pairs.e: A collection of approximately 400 or more poems is there.

pairs.m: F) विदेह ग्रुपपर आएल प्रमुख कथाकेँ मैथिली कथा नामक ब्लागपर राखल गेल अछि जकरा http://maithili-katha.
pairs.e: F) Main fiction that came on Videha group was placed on the blog named Maithili Katha, which can be seen by going to http://maithili-katha.

pairs.m: com/ लिंकपर जा क' देखि सकै छी।
pairs.e: com/.

pairs.m: G) विदेह ग्रुपपर आएल प्रमुख आलोचना, समीक्षा आदिकेँ मैथिली कथा नामक ब्लागपर राखल गेल अछि जकरा http://maithili-samalochna.
pairs.e: G) Main criticism and reviews etc. that came on Videha group were placed on a blog, which can be seen by going to http://maithili-samalochna.

pairs.m: com/ लिंकपर जा क' देखि सकै छी।
pairs.e: com/.

pairs.m: मिथिलांचल गीत- https://www.
pairs.e: Mithilanchal Geet — https://www.

pairs.m: अनचिन्हार आखर (गजल, रुबाइ ओ कता संग्रह)
pairs.e: Sri Govind Jha — By placing Videha on the internet waves, you have awakened a wave of mother language Maithili worldwide. Regret that until now I could not accompany you in this great campaign. I hear that you like suggestions and constructive criticism, so the urge to write something arose. My assistance and cooperation will always be available to you.

pairs.m: स्वतंत्रचेता (अरविन्द ठाकुर: व्यक्तित्व-कृतित्व, विदेहक अरविन्द ठाकुर विशेषांक केर संशोधित रूप) श्री गजेन्द्र ठाकुरजीक संगे सह-संपादित पोथी
pairs.e: Anchinhar Akhar (ghazal, rubayi, and qata collection)

pairs.m: मैथिली गजल: आगमन ओ प्रस्थान बिंदु (संपादित रूपमे मैथिली गजल आलोचनाक पहिल पोथी), ई-भर्सन प्रकाशित
pairs.e: Swatantracheta (Arvind Thakur: Personality and Works — revised form of Videha's Arvind Thakur special issue) Co-edited works with Sri Gajendra Thakur —

pairs.m: नित नवल दिनेश कुमार मिश्र (लेखक- गजेन्द्र ठाकुर)
pairs.e: Nit Naval Dinesh Kumar Mishra (author — Gajendra Thakur)

pairs.m: Media sharing networks — ई विभिन्न तरीकासँ फोटो, आडियो ओ भडियो सार्वजनिक करबाक सुविधा दै छै जेना- Instagram, Snapchat, YouTube, soundcloud आदि। एहि कैटेगरीमे आरो नाम भऽ सकैए।
pairs.e: Media sharing networks — These give the facility to make photos, audio, and video public in various ways — such as Instagram, Snapchat, YouTube, SoundCloud, etc. Other names can also be in this category.

pairs.m: मैथिलीमे स्त्री लेखिकाक संख्या-- मैथिली लेल ई बहुत नीक जे फेसबुक मैथिल स्त्री लेल ओहन साधन बनि गेल जिनकर बोलकेँ बहुत रास कुच्रकमे फँसा कऽ राखि देने छल ई समाज।
pairs.e: Number of women writers in Maithili — This is very good for Maithili that Facebook became such a medium for Maithili women whose voice this society had been suppressing by trapping it in many complexities.

pairs.m: आजुक स्त्री कोनो बातक परबाह केने बिना अपन भावनाकेँ फेसबुकपर परसि रहल छथि।
pairs.e: Today's women, without worrying about anything, are spreading their emotions on Facebook.

pairs.m: आ तइसँ मैथिलीमे नव-नव अध्याय-अनुभव जुड़ि रहल अछि।
pairs.e: And from that, new chapters and experiences keep getting added to Maithili.

pairs.m: प्रोफाइल रीचमे कमी-- प्रोफाइल रीच केर मतलब भेल जे अहाँक पोस्ट कतेक लोक धरि पहुँचै छै मुदा जँ पोस्टपर कोनो लाइक-कमेंट नै कएल जाए तँ पोस्टकर्ता ई नै बूझि पाबै छथि जे कतेक लोक पोस्ट देखलाह (स्टोरी एवं कोनो प्राइभेट ग्रुपमे के-के देखलाह से आबि जाइत छै, भीडियोमे कतेक लोक देखलाह से आबि जाइत छै) तँइ साधारणतः लोक लाइक-कमेंटमे कमीकेँ "प्रोफाइल रीचमे कमी" मानि लै छथि।
pairs.e: Decrease in profile reach — The meaning of profile reach is how many people your post reaches. But if no like or comment is made on a post, the poster cannot know how many people saw the post (for Story and in some private groups, who-who saw it does appear; for video, how many people watched it appears) — so generally people consider a decrease in likes and comments as "decrease in profile reach."

pairs.m: समान्यतः फेसबुक शुरूआतमे कोनो आदमीक लिस्टक अधिकाशं लोकक पोस्टकेँ देखाबैत छलै।
pairs.e: Generally Facebook used to initially show most people's posts from anyone's list.

pairs.m: लोक स्क्रोल करैत छल आ ओकर लिस्टक पोस्ट देखाइत छलै तेनाहिते दोसरो आदमीकेँ हमर वा अहाँक पोस्ट देखाइत छल हेतै।
pairs.e: People would scroll and the posts from their list would appear, and similarly other people would also have seen my or your post.

pairs.m: मुदा बादमे फेसबुक लोकक रुचि एंव ओ अपने कतेक दोसर लोकक पोस्टपर जाइत छै ताही अनुरूप रीच दै छै।
pairs.e: But later Facebook started giving reach according to people's interest and how many others' posts they themselves visit.

pairs.m: ई बदलाव लगभग 2015 केर बाद भेलै आ ताहि समयमे वा एखनो भाजपाक सरकार छै।
pairs.e: This change happened around after 2015, and at that time or even now there is BJP's government.

pairs.m: तँइ संभवतः लोककेँ 'प्रोफाइल रीचमे कमी' केर समस्या तकनीकी नै राजनैतिक लागए लगलै।
pairs.e: So probably people started seeing the "profile reach decrease" problem as not technical but political.

pairs.m: मुदा ई रीच केर समस्या भारतेमे नै आनो देशमे भेलै।
pairs.e: But this reach problem happened in India and also in other countries.

pairs.m: ओना सभ सरकार अपना समयमे मीडियाकेँ दबा दै छै तँइ वर्तमान भाजपा सरकार सेहो केने हेतै मुदा जे बदलाव फेसबुक अपने कए रहल छै ताहि लेल राहुल-मोदी-अमित-सोनियाकेँ जिम्मेदार नै ठहराएल जा सकैए।
pairs.e: Though all governments press media in their own time, so the current BJP government too would have done it. But the changes that Facebook itself is making — for that Rahul-Modi-Amit-Sonia cannot be held responsible.

pairs.m: मैथिलीमे ई समस्या ओहने लोक सभ लग छनि जिनका अपन ज्ञानक दाबी छनि आ ओ अपन हरेक पोस्टक अपन लिस्टक हरेक लोकक लाइक-कमेंट चाहै छथि मुदा ओ अपने कहियो गलतियोसँ आन लोकक पोस्टपर नै जाइ छथि।
pairs.e: In Maithili this problem exists with those people who have claims of their knowledge, and they want every person from their list to like and comment on their every post, but they themselves never go to others' posts even by mistake.

pairs.m: जँ हमर लिस्टमे 1000 लोक छथि आ हम सभ लोकक पोस्टपर जइए (भने लाइक-कमेंट करियै कि नै करियै) तँ हमरो पोस्ट ओहि सभ लोक लग पहुँचबे टा करतै।
pairs.e: If I have 1000 people in my list and I visit all people's posts (whether I like-comment or not), then my post too will definitely reach all those people.

pairs.m: जँ हम हजारमेसँ 200 लोकक पोस्टपर जेबै तँ हमरो पोस्ट ओही 200 लोक लग पहुँचतै आ 800 लग दस-बीस दिनमे एकटा।
pairs.e: If I visit posts of 200 out of a thousand people, my post will reach those 200 people, and to the remaining 800 it will reach once in ten or twenty days.

pairs.m: फेसबुकक ई वर्तमान स्वरूप बेसी व्यावहारिक छै (लोक एकरा राजनैतिक बना देलकै से बात अलग)।
pairs.e: Facebook's current form is more practical (people have made it political — that is a different matter).

pairs.m: तँइ सी फर्स्ट आप्शन रहितो लोक ओहन पोस्टकेँ नै देखि पाबै छै।
pairs.e: So the "See First" option being there still, people cannot see such posts.

pairs.m: बहुत लोक अपन लिस्टमे मित्र तँ राखै छथि मुदा ओ मित्र सभ हुनका अनफालो केने रहै छनि। एहनो स्थितिमे पोस्टक रीच कम हेतै।
pairs.e: Many people keep friends in their list but those friends have unfollowed them. In such a situation too the post's reach will be less.

pairs.m: एहिठाम लोक पेड रीच लऽ कऽ सेहो भ्रममे छथि।
pairs.e: Here people are also in confusion regarding paid reach.

pairs.m: पेड रीच प्रोडक्ट लेल छै प्रोफाइल लेल नै मुदा बहुत लोक अपनाकेँ प्रोडक्ट बना पेड रीच केर सुविधा लऽ लै छथि।
pairs.e: Paid reach is for a product, not for a profile, but many people make themselves into a product and take the paid reach facility.

pairs.m: आन लोककेँ बुझाइ छनि जे हुनकर रीच बेसी आ हमर कम अछि।
pairs.e: Others think that their reach is more and mine is less.

pairs.m: हरेक राजनीतिक दल केर पेज पेड रीच छै ताहूमे जे बेसी दाम देने छै ताहि पेजक रीच बहुत हेतै आ ओकर पोस्ट फेसबुक लेल महत्वपूर्ण हेतै।
pairs.e: Every political party's page has paid reach — of those who paid more, that page's reach will be more and their post will be important for Facebook.

pairs.m: बहुत संभव जे भाजपा केने हो मुदा सोचियौ जँ कांग्रेसक सरकार बनतै तँ कि ओ ई सुविधा छोड़ि देतै?
pairs.e: It is very possible BJP did it, but think — if Congress's government is formed, would they leave this facility?

pairs.m: सोझ बात बुझियौ जे आब प्रोफाइल रीच एहि बातपर निर्भर करैत छै जे अहाँ आन कतेक लोकक पोस्टपर गेलियै एवं आन कतेक लोक अहाँक पोस्टपर आएल।
pairs.e: Understand simply: now profile reach depends on how many others' posts you visited and how many others came to your posts.

pairs.m: दूनूमेसँ जँ कोनो एकटा शर्त पूरा हेतै तखने रीच बनल रहतै।
pairs.e: If either of these conditions is fulfilled, only then reach will remain.

pairs.m: ओना उपरक दूनू तथ्य सर्वज्ञात छै मुदा तकर बादो भ्रम पसरल छै।
pairs.e: Though the above two facts are well known, still misconceptions have spread.

pairs.m: फेसबुकपर मैथिलीक किछु प्रसिद्ध ग्रुप आ एकर काज –
pairs.e: Some Famous Maithili Groups on Facebook and Their Work —

pairs.m: मिनाप MINAP (Mithila Natyakala Parishad) https://www.
pairs.e: MINAP (Mithila Natyakala Parishad) https://www.

pairs.m: com/groups/258380252004/ एडमिन, सुनील कुमार मल्लिक, प्रवेश मल्लिक। ,
pairs.e: com/groups/258380252004/ — Admin: Sunil Kumar Mallik, Pravesh Mallik.

pairs.m: मैथिली टी. भी- https://www.
pairs.e: Maithili TV — https://www.

pairs.m: मैथिली गजलक व्याकरण ओ इतिहास (ई भर्सन प्रकाशित)
pairs.e: Sri Ramanand Renu — Thank you for running this e-journal "Videha" fortnightly and promoting your mother language. Ahead I give my best wishes from the heart for all your Maithili work.

pairs.m: मैथिलीक प्रतिनिधि गजल (1905सँ 2022 धरि), ई-भर्सन प्रकाशित सम्मान- बर्ख 2014 लेल विदेह भाषा सम्मान (समानान्तर साहित्य अकादेमी सम्मान)सँ पोथी “अनचिन्हार आखर” (गजल संग्रह) लेल सम्मानित। संपर्क सूत्र-(मेल) ashish. anchinhar@gmail. com संपर्क सूत्र-(मोबाइल) 8876162759/8134849022 अनचिन्हार आखर केर लिंक- http://anchinharakharkolkata. blogspot.
pairs.e: Maithili Ghazal's Grammar and History (e-version published)

pairs.m: दूषण पञ्जी- The Black Book (लेखक- गजेन्द्र ठाकुर)
pairs.e: Dooshan Panji — The Black Book (author — Gajendra Thakur)

pairs.m: Discussion forums — ई विभिन्न तरीकासँ लोकक बीच तर्क करबाक, प्रश्न करबाक, उत्तर देबाक सुविधा दै छै जेना- reddit, Quora, Digg आदि। एहि कैटेगरीमे आरो नाम भऽ सकैए।
pairs.e: Discussion forums — These give the facility to argue, ask questions, and give answers among people in various ways — such as Reddit, Quora, Digg, etc. Other names can also be in this category.

pairs.m: मैथिली दलित साहित्य केर प्रचारक-- फेसबुकक माध्यमे भारत-नेपाल मिला कऽ जतेक मैथिलीक दलित लेखक, विचारक एलाह ततेक मात्र सिद्ध सरहपादे कालमे छल मने मैथिलीक एकदम शुरूआती समयमे।
pairs.e: Promoter of Maithili Dalit literature — Through Facebook, combining India and Nepal, as many Maithili Dalit writers and thinkers came, that many existed only in the time of Siddha Saraha pada — meaning in Maithili's very beginning period.

pairs.m: लगभग हजार सालसँ मैथिलीक समाजिक ताना-बानाकेँ जे तोड़ने छल तकरा फेसबुक तोड़ि देलक आ सही अर्थमे "मैथिल समाज" केर निर्माणमे सहयोग देलक।
pairs.e: About a thousand years of Maithili's social fabric having been broken by Facebook — in the true sense it cooperated in building "Maithili society."

pairs.m: फेसबुक आ समाज
pairs.e: Facebook and Society

pairs.m: फेसबुक आ फेसबुक ग्रुपसँ किछु लेखक बंधु तमसाएल रहै छथि।
pairs.e: Some writer friends are annoyed with Facebook and Facebook groups.

pairs.m: हुनक तामसक कारण ई जे लोक हुनकर कथित गंभीर रचनापर धियान नै दऽ फालतूक फोटो, बात आदिपर बेसी सक्रिय रहै छथि।
pairs.e: The reason for their annoyance is that people do not pay attention to their supposedly serious compositions and are more active on useless photos and talk.

pairs.m: ताहूमे जखन कियो कोनो घास-पात, तर-तरकारी, गाछ-बिरिछक फोटो दऽ पूछै छै-ई की छै आ ताहिपर हजारो लोकक लाइक-कमेंट आ से देखि लेखक सभ तखने जरि कऽ छाउर भऽ जाइत छथि।
pairs.e: Even more so when someone puts a photo of some grass, vegetable, or tree and asks — what is this? — and thousands of people like and comment on it.

pairs.m: हुनका बुझाइ छनि जे हमर एतेक गंभीर विचार नष्ट भेल जा रहल अछि आ लोक सभ फालतू काजमे लागल अछि।
pairs.e: Seeing this, writer people immediately become ashes. They feel their so many serious thoughts are being destroyed and people are engaged in useless work.

pairs.m: मुदा एहन लेखक सभकेँ फेसबुकक उद्येश्ये नै बूझल छनि।
pairs.e: But such writers have not understood Facebook's purpose itself.

pairs.m: वस्तुतः फेसबुकक जन्म एही सभ लेल भेल छै जाहिसँ लोक एक-दोसरसँ जुड़ल रहै।
pairs.e: In truth, Facebook was born for all these very things — so that people can stay connected with each other.

pairs.m: बादमे किछु प्रबुद्ध एकर उपयोग साहित्य-संगीत-राजनीति एवं अन्य काज लेल करए लगलै।
pairs.e: Later some enlightened ones started using it for literature, music, politics, and other work.

pairs.m: लेखक सभकेँ धैर्य राखि एहि माध्यमकेँ लेखन लेल सार्थक बनबए पड़तनि आ तखन संभव जे साहित्यो केर दिन घुरतै।
pairs.e: Writers need to patiently make this medium meaningful for writing, and then it is possible literature's day will also return.

pairs.m: ओना घास-पात, तर-तरकारी, गाछ-बिरिछक फोटो लेल हमर विचार अछि जे ई ओहन लोक सभ लेल उपयोगी जे कि गाम-घरसँ कटि गेल छथि। आ फेसबुकपर एहन संख्या लाखोमें अछि तँइ एहन पोस्ट सभपर बेसी सक्रियता रहै छै।
pairs.e: Though I agree that photos of grass, vegetables, and trees are useful for those people who have been cut off from villages and countryside, and that number is in lakhs on Facebook, so there is more activity on such posts.

pairs.m: कहियो काल किछु वस्तुक संदर्भमे हमरो जानकारी बढ़ि जाइए एहन-एहन पोस्टसँ से हम स्वीकारै छी।
pairs.e: Sometimes some information also increases for me from such posts, I accept that.

pairs.m: हम मात्र हिंट देलहुँ एहि विषयपर कोनो समाजशास्त्री काज करथि तँ नीक विवेचना भऽ सकैए।
pairs.e: I just gave a hint — on this subject if some sociologist does work, a good analysis can be made.

pairs.m: फेसबुकसँ समाजिक संगठन हेबामे सुविधा भेलैए से चाहे ओ कोनो पाबनि-तिहारक संदर्भमे हो वा कि बाढ़ि-अकाल वा आन कोनो परस्थितिमे।
pairs.e: Through Facebook, there has been convenience in social organisation, whether it is for some festival or in floods, famine, or any other situation.

pairs.m: बहुतो एहनो घटनाक सबूत अछि जाहिमे कोनो हेड़ाएल लोक अपन परिवारक लोक फेसबुकक कारण भेटलै।
pairs.e: There is also evidence of many such events in which some lost person found their family through Facebook.

pairs.m: फेसबुकपर एक मिनटमे कोनो समाद हजार ठाम पसरि जाइत छै।
pairs.e: In one minute through Facebook, any news spreads to a thousand places.

pairs.m: फेसबुक आ धर्म
pairs.e: Facebook and Religion

pairs.m: फेसबुक मिथिलाक अपन निज ओ खाँटी पाबनि तिहार लेल अमृतक समान काज केलक अछि।
pairs.e: Facebook has worked like nectar for Mithila's own original and authentic festivals.

pairs.m: बड़का पाबनि जेना दुर्गापूजा, होली, दिवाली, छठि आदिक शुभकामना तँ प्रचलित छल मुदा एहि माध्यमसँ हैप्पी तिलासंक्रांति, हैप्पी जूड़शीतल, हैप्पी जितिया, हैप्पी चौरचन, हैप्पी भरदुतिया आदि बेसी प्रचलित भेल।
pairs.e: Auspicious wishes for big festivals like Durga Puja, Holi, Diwali, Chhath, etc. were already prevalent, but through this medium "Happy Tilasankranti," "Happy Jur-Shital," "Happy Jitiya," "Happy Chaurchan," "Happy Bhardutiya," and more became more common.

pairs.m: एकर अतिरिक्त मिथिलामे पसरल उपासक आगू सेहो हैप्पी लागए लागल।
pairs.e: Beyond this, devotees spread throughout Mithila also started feeling happy on this medium.

pairs.m: मिथिलाक एकटा बहुत बड़का वर्ग (गैर-ब्राह्मण ओ कायस्थ) सेहो अपन-अपन पूजाक लऽ कऽ फेसबुकक प्रयोग कऽ रहल छथि आ ई आरो नीक बात भेलै।
pairs.e: A very large section of Mithila (non-Brahmin and Kayastha) is also using Facebook regarding their own worship, and this is an even better thing.

pairs.m: निश्चित तौरपर मिथिलाक पछुआएल पाबनि-तिहार फेसबुक ओ अन्य प्लेटफार्म पाबि मजबूत भेल अछि।
pairs.e: Certainly, Mithila's lagging-behind festivals have strengthened by finding Facebook and other platforms.

pairs.m: किछु एहन पाबनि जे कि व्यक्तिगत होइत छै जेना कोजगरा, मधुश्रावणी, भुँइया बाबाक पूजा आदिक कायाकल्प सेहो भऽ रहल अछि एहि माध्यमसँ।
pairs.e: Some festivals that are personal — such as Kojagara, Madhushravani, Bhuiya Baba's worship, and others — their transformation is also happening through this medium.

pairs.m: धर्मक एहि रूपसँ मैथिलीक गीत विधा बेसी लाभ उठेलक।
pairs.e: This religious form benefited Maithili's song genre more.

pairs.m: जाहि पाबनि सभहक गीत प्राचीने कालसँ नै केर बराबरि होइत छल ताहू पाबनि सभहक गीत आब बहुतक संख्यामे भेटत। अप्रैल 2016 मे फेसबुक लाइभ हेबाक सुविधा देलकै मने अहाँ अपन भीडियो रूपमे कोनो बात सेहो कहि सकैत छी।
pairs.e: Those festivals for which compositions had been almost absent since ancient times — even for those festivals, compositions are now found in large numbers. In April 2016, Facebook gave the live facility — meaning you can also say something in video form.

pairs.m: ई सुविधा आन विषय लेल जेहन हो मुदा मैथिली गीत-संगीत लेल अमृतक समान काज केलक।
pairs.e: Whatever this facility may be for other subjects, for Maithili song and music it worked like nectar.

pairs.m: लोक अपन-अपन लाइभ प्रस्तुति दऽ अपन प्रतिभाकेँ समाजक सामने राखि देलखनि।
pairs.e: People presented their live performances and placed their talent before society.

pairs.m: जकर प्रत्यक्ष लाभ एहि विधाकेँ भेटि रहल छै।
pairs.e: The direct benefit of this is reaching this genre.

pairs.m: ओना ई अलग बात जे बर्ख 2020 मे लाकडाउनक कारणे एहि लाइभ केर दुरुपयोग भेलै। एक दिस जनता भायनक दुख भोगि रहल चल तँ दोसर दिस साहित्यकार लेल 'लाइभ काल' चलि रहल छल।
pairs.e: Though it is a different matter that in the year 2020, due to lockdown, this live was misused. While on one side the public was suffering terrifying pain, on the other side a "live call" was running for writers.

pairs.m: फेसबुक आ राजनीति
pairs.e: Facebook and Politics

pairs.m: जखने समाज छै तहने राजनीति हेबे करतै से चाहे कोनो स्तरक किए ने हो।
pairs.e: When there is society, there will be politics — whatever level that may be.

pairs.m: आइ स्थिति ई छै जे देशक हरेक नेता ओ पार्टीक सोशल मीडिया प्रभारी छै।
pairs.e: Today the situation is that every leader and party has a social media in-charge.

pairs.m: आ एहि लेल भारी-भरकम खर्च प्रस्तावित करै जाइए एहि प्रोफेशन केर लोक सभ।
pairs.e: And for this, hefty expenditure is proposed by such professionals.

pairs.m: भारतमे भारतक चुनाव प्रचार जमीनपर कम आ सोशल मीडियापर बेसी होइत छै। आ एहिसँ कोनो नेताक हारि-जीतक समीकरण सेहो तय होइत छै।
pairs.e: In India, election campaigning for India's elections happens less on the ground and more on social media.

pairs.m: 2008 मे अमेरिकामे बराक ओबामा अपन चुनाव केर प्रबंधन सोशल मीडियामे सेहो करबेलाह आ जितलाह ताही तर्जपर 2014 मे भारतक प्रधानमंत्री चुनाव भाजपा सोशल मीडिया द्वारा लड़लक आ ओहि चुनावमे जीतल आ तकर बाद भारतक सभ राजनैतिक दल अपन-अपन पक्ष फेसबुकपर राखए लागल ताहूमे एखन धरि भाजपे आगू अछि।
pairs.e: And from this the equation of any leader's defeat and victory is also determined. In 2008, in America, Barack Obama also managed his election campaign on social media and won. On the same pattern, in 2014 the BJP fought India's Prime Minister's election through social media and won, and after that all India's political parties started placing their side on Facebook — of which BJP is still ahead.

pairs.m: एहिसँ पहिने भारतेमे अन्ना हजारे द्वारा 2011 मे कएल गेल अनशन सेहो फेसबुकक कारणे पसरल आ ओहि आंदोलनसँ किछु नीक नेता जेना अरविंद केजरीवाल, मनीष सिसोदिया आदि निकललाह। फेसबुक राजनीतिकेँ पलटियो दैत छै।
pairs.e: Before this, Anna Hazare's fast in 2011 also spread because of Facebook, and from that movement some good leaders like Arvind Kejriwal and Manish Sisodia emerged. Facebook also turns politics around.

pairs.m: 2010 मे मिश्र (इजिप्ट) मात्र फेसबुकक सहारासँ अपन भ्रष्ट ओ निरंकुश शासनकेँ खत्म केलक एकरा Egyptian revolution of 2011 केर नामसँ जानल जाइत छै। विश्वक हरेक कोनामे अपन अवाज उठेबाक लेल फेसबुक आ सुलभ साधन छै।
pairs.e: In 2010, Egypt (Misr) eliminated its corrupt and autocratic rule with only Facebook's support — this is known as the "Egyptian Revolution of 2011." In every corner of the world, Facebook is the most accessible means for raising one's voice.

pairs.m: फेसबुक आ बेपार
pairs.e: Facebook and Trade

pairs.m: विज्ञापन लेल फेसबुक लेल नीक साधन अछि आ बेपार तँ मुख्यतः विज्ञापनेपर टिकल अछि।
pairs.e: For advertising, Facebook is a good medium, and trade is mainly based on advertising.

pairs.m: जहाँ आन माध्यमसँ विज्ञापन लेल पाइ खर्चा करए पड़ैत छै ततए फेसबुक ओ अन्य सोशल मीडियासँ अपेक्षाकृत नमहर सर्किलमे अहाँ अपन चीजकेँ राखि सकैत छी।
pairs.e: Where advertising through other media requires spending money, through Facebook and other social media you can place your thing before a relatively larger circle.

pairs.m: प्रायः हरेक कम्पनी केर सोशल मीडिया एकांउट छै जतए ओ अपन नव वस्तु, स्कीम आदिक विवरण दै छै।
pairs.e: Almost every company has a social media account where it gives details of its new products, schemes, etc.

pairs.m: एकर अतिरिक्त आनो विषयमे फेसबुक सहायक भेल।
pairs.e: Beyond this too, Facebook was helpful in other subjects.

pairs.m: आ एहने एकटा विषय अछि मजाकिया फोटो, मीम, कार्टून आदि।
pairs.e: And one such subject is humorous photos, memes, and cartoons.

pairs.m: फेसबुकपर मैथिलीमे लिखल आ मैथिलसँ संबंधित मजाकिया फोटो, मीम, कार्टून बहुत आएल आ आबिए रहल अछि।
pairs.e: On Facebook, many humorous photos, memes, and cartoons written in Maithili and related to Maithils came and keep coming.

pairs.m: इंटरनेटपर मैथिली लेखकक उपर पहिल बेर एडिट कएल फोटो (मजाकिया, मीम, कार्टून) एकै संगे तीन टा लेखक गजेन्द्र ठाकुर, आशीष अनचिन्हार ओ उमेश मंडलपर एलै जे विकास ठाकोर नामक एक फेक आइडी 2011 मे बनेने रहै।
pairs.e: The first edited photos (humorous, meme, cartoon) on Maithili writers on the internet came simultaneously for three writers — Gajendra Thakur, Ashish Anchinhar, and Umesh Mandal — made by one fake ID called Vikas Thakore in 2011.

pairs.m: जे ओहि समयमे फेसबुकपर एक्टिभ रहथि से जनैत हेता जे विकास ठाकोर दू मासमे मिथिला राज्य बना देबाक दावा केने रहै।
pairs.e: Those who were active on Facebook at that time would know that Vikas Thakore had claimed to form a Mithila state in two months.

pairs.m: फोटो दऽ रहल छी।
pairs.e: I am giving the photo.

pairs.m: अपनेपर हँसि कऽ अपन नाम इतिहासमे पहिल हेबाक घुसिया रहल छी।
pairs.e: Laughing at oneself, I am recording my name in history as the first.

pairs.m: ई कार्टून बनबए बला लोक कार्टूने धरि नै रहलाह हरेक पाबनि-तिहारपर ओकर अनुकूल फोटोशाप सेहो करए लगलाह जे कि आकर्षक छल आ पाबनि-तिहारकेँ एकटा नव रंग देलक।
pairs.e: The people who made these cartoons did not stop at cartoons — on every festival and occasion they also started doing photoshop accordingly, which was attractive and gave a new colour to festivals.

pairs.m: ई छल सकारात्मक पक्ष मुदा एकर अतिरिक्त किछु नकारात्मक तत्व सेहो छै आ ई तँ संसारक नियमे छै जे कोनो वस्तुमे गुण-अवगुण दूनू रहैत छै।
pairs.e: These were the positive aspects, but beyond this there are also some negative elements, and this is the rule of the world — every thing has both virtues and defects.

pairs.m: फेसबुकक दू टा फीचर आ दू टा भ्रम
pairs.e: Two Facebook Features and Two Misconceptions

pairs.m: मैथिलीमे बहुत रास भ्रम छै आ ताहूमे लगभग 99% भ्रम व्यक्तिगत भ्रम छै।
pairs.e: There are many misconceptions in Maithili, and among those almost 99% misconceptions are personal misconceptions.

pairs.m: मुदा मैथिल बहुत चालाक होइत छथि आ ओ अपन व्यक्तिगत भ्रमकेँ सार्वजनिक भ्रम बना देबाक कला जानै छथि।
pairs.e: But Maithili people are very clever and they know the art of turning their personal misconception into a public misconception.

pairs.m: मैथिलीमे सोशल मीडिया तँ एलै मुदा ओकरासँ संबंधित भ्रम सेहो एलै आ लोक ओकरा अपन व्यक्तिगत भ्रम बना पसारहो लगलै।
pairs.e: Social media came to Maithili but the misconceptions related to it also came, and people started spreading them as personal misconceptions.

pairs.m: आइ अइ ठाम हम फेसबुकसँ संबंधित दू टा भ्रमपर विचार राखब--
pairs.e: Today here I will put my views on two misconceptions related to Facebook —

Its historical evaluation and cultural reflection will appear amazingly in people's eyes by the end of this century.

pairs.e: Bookmarking and content curation networks — These give the facility to save any text or PDF in various ways — such as Pinterest, Flipboard, etc. Other names can also be in this category.

pairs.e: Consumer review networks — These give the facility to know about business and customer interest-disinterest in various ways — such as Yelp, Zomato, TripAdvisor, etc. Other names can also be in this category.

pairs.m: com/groups/226653764434000/ घटकैती झारखण्ड मिथिला मंचक शुरुआत 26 नवम्बर 16 के झारखण्ड मिथिला मंच के स्वयंसेवक सुजीत झा जी केलथि।
pairs.e: com/groups/226653764434000/ — Ghatkati Jharkhand Mithila Manch was started on 26 November 2016 by volunteer Sujit Jha of Jharkhand Mithila Manch.

pairs.m: वर्तमान एडमिन निशा झा एवं सुजीत झा छथि।
pairs.e: Current admins are Nisha Jha and Sujit Jha.

pairs.m: एडमिनक उद्गार एना अछि "एहि ग्रुप द्वारा पहिल विवाहक समाचार मई 17 मे प्राप्त भेल जे संपन्न भेल छल बोकारोमे, तकर बादसँ एखन धरि 40 गोटे समाचार देने छथि जे हम्मर पुत्र-पुत्री के विवाह एहि घटकैती ग्रुप द्वारा भेल, विवाह त बहुतो होइ ये ग्रुपक माध्यमे लेकिन ग्रुप मे सुचना बहुतो कम गोटे देइ छैथ, खैर कोनो बात नै हम सब निःस्वार्थ अप्पन कार्य में लागल छी, वर्तमानमे एहि ग्रुपमे 3000 सँ ऊपर बायोडाटा राखल अछि”।
pairs.e: The admins' statement is as follows: "Through this group the first news of a marriage was received in May 2017, which was concluded in Bokaro; since then until now 40 people have given news that our son's or daughter's marriage happened through this matchmaking group. Many marriages happen through the group's medium but very few give news in the group. Whatever the case, we are all engaged in our work selflessly. Currently more than 3000 biodata have been placed in this group."

pairs.e: Dr. Gangesh Gunjan — The sensitive mind engaged in this Videha-work, the nectar colour of effort dedicated to Maithili — I am confident it will start a distinctly separate special chapter in history. With endless good wishes and congratulations, affectionately. . . your book Kurukshetram Antarmanek at first sight seems very grand and useful.

pairs.e: Blogging and publishing networks — These give the facility to publish any text online in various ways — such as Blogger, WordPress, Tumblr, Medium, etc. Other names can also be in this category.

pairs.e: Interest-based networks — These give the facility to make one's personal interests and disinterests public in various ways — such as Goodreads, Houzz, Last.
